name: Furax
description: These power gauntlets lack the range of most Melee Weapons, but Furax is far more devastating when you strike an enemy in close combat.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.description: These power gauntlets lack the range of most Melee Weapons, but Furax is far more devastating when you strike an enemy in close combat.

Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: The Amalgam Furax Body Count Mod now applies a Blast proc and Stagger on Melee kills.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Ringers skin not working properly with Furax Wraith as per

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the MK1-Furax being purchasable with Platinum, this should be a Credit only item.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Furax weapon series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of the Furax in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.10.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Valkyr’s Hysteria finisher animations using Furax animations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a common Furax stance card appears in the combos list for Valkyr while Hysteria is active.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with a Common Furax stance mod being displayed in Hysteria's combo page.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘Rank 30 Furax’ bug appearing if using Hysteria and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.
